_meta.note: PURGED: Contaminated data removed 2026-03-11. Prices were from raw cards, not PSA graded slabs. categoryId prefix fix applied to graded-update-ebay-avg.js. Will repopulate on next workflow run with correct PSA graded listing data.

daysOnMarket.meaning: Average age of ACTIVE listings (not time-to-sell). Falls back to item detail fetch if summary omits creation date.
